items.title: OpenAI ends Microsoft legal peril over its $50B Amazon deal
items.summary: OpenAI has won major concessions from its largest shareholder, Microsoft, that will allow it to sell products on AWS, while Microsoft get more cash in a revenue-share agreement.
items.whyItMatters: Technology updates can influence strategy, risk, and the speed of change across digital products.
